ingredients.item: 2 tbsp Pilpelchuma or harissa (store-bought or see recipe)
ingredients.original: 2 tbsp Pilpelchuma or harissa (store-bought or see recipe)

ingredients.item: 2 large red peppers, cut into ¼-inch / 0.5cm dice (2 cups / 300 g in total)
ingredients.original: 2 large red peppers, cut into ¼-inch / 0.5cm dice (2 cups / 300 g in total)

ingredients.item: 5 large, very ripe tomatoes, chopped (5 cups / 800 g in total); canned are also fine
ingredients.original: 5 large, very ripe tomatoes, chopped (5 cups / 800 g in total); canned are also fine

ingredients.item: 4 large free-range eggs, plus 4 egg yolks
ingredients.original: 4 large free-range eggs, plus 4 egg yolks

ingredients.item: ½ cup / 120 g labneh (store-bought or see recipe) or thick yogurt
ingredients.original: ½ cup / 120 g labneh (store-bought or see recipe) or thick yogurt
